findings.title: No pre-commit hooks, CODEOWNERS, or GitHub Actions exist despite being referenced as enforced controls
findings.detail: Multiple files assert that pre-commit hooks enforce secret-pattern rejection and that CODEOWNERS + a dedicated GitHub Action enforce the Protected Paths auto-merge gate. However, the enforcement files did not exist. This meant the entire security enforcement layer was aspirational documentation, not reality.
findings.fix_sketch: Wire .husky/pre-commit, .github/CODEOWNERS, .github/workflows/protected-paths.yml, and .claude/settings.json.

findings.title: Sprint SPRINT-2026-05-A ends today (2026-05-20) but repo has had zero updates since initial scaffold on 2026-05-15
findings.detail: The sprint defined in SPRINT.md ended with zero feature commits in this repo. Factory coordination docs were 5 days stale on sprint-end day.
findings.fix_sketch: Reconcile SPRINT/ROADMAP/STATUS to git reality without fabricating progress.

findings.title: ENV.md missing Stripe and Documenso secret_refs that INTEGRATIONS.md declares
findings.detail: INTEGRATIONS.md declares STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, and DOCUMENSO_API_KEY but none were present in ENV.md rotation calendar or var tables.
findings.fix_sketch: Add rows for all four vars with scope/rotation/consumed_by. Add to rotation calendar.

findings.title: ADR-0006 contains a lazy reference 'NG-something equivalent' instead of citing the actual Non-Goal ID
findings.detail: In docs/decisions/0006-retell-default-voice.md, the ADR contains 'NG-something equivalent' as an unresolved placeholder. Per append-only invariant, cannot edit the accepted ADR body. Must append an erratum.
findings.fix_sketch: Append an erratum clarifying the reference points to SPRINT.md §No-gos item 5.

findings.title: ROADMAP 'Not Doing' section only covers 6 of 10 No-Gos from NON_GOALS.md
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md Not Doing section listed only 6 of 10 No-Gos, missing NG-5, NG-7, NG-8, NG-9, NG-10.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace with a pointer to NON_GOALS.md as the canonical source.

findings.title: README.md references stale IFleet status memory file (2026-05-13), missing the 2026-05-19 launch
findings.detail: README.md hardcoded a stale memory file path. IFleet launched 2026-05-19 but README pointed to pre-launch status.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace hardcoded path with a note to check MEMORY.md index. Update IFleet status row.

findings.title: SECURITY.md security.txt references unresolved TBD URLs that will break RFC 9116 compliance
findings.detail: security.txt block contained '(TBD)' suffixes on Encryption and Policy URLs.
findings.fix_sketch: Remove (TBD) entries from security.txt block.

findings.title: costs.json references IFleet PR #39 as the cost tracker but this is a coordination-only repo
findings.detail: costs.json _notes claimed 'Totals recomputed by IFleet cost tracker (PR #39) on every write' — this repo cannot be written to by IFleet across repo boundaries.
findings.fix_sketch: Correct the note to clarify Factory-repo-only tracking.

findings.title: CHANGELOG.md ADR-0010 missing from the Decisions subsection
findings.detail: ADR-0010 was missing from CHANGELOG Decisions subsection.
findings.fix_sketch: Already fixed in 2026-05-23 audit.

findings.title: ROADMAP 'Not Doing' duplicates the same No-Go in two differently-worded bullets
findings.detail: Two bullets expressed the same NoGo-1 with different framing.
findings.fix_sketch: Fixed via pointer-to-NON_GOALS.md replacement.

findings.title: Retell platform decision marked pending but architecture treats it as locked — no deadline for R1 confirmation
findings.detail: ADR-0006 title says 'pending Esme R1 confirmation'. SPRINT-2026-05-A ended without R1 research.
findings.fix_sketch: Added explicit deadline ACTION REQUIRED notice in ROADMAP.md Q3 open questions.

findings.title: RUNBOOK SLOs are TBD with no process to define them before first incident
findings.detail: RUNBOOK.md trigger rules reference TBD per-product SLOs.
findings.fix_sketch: Added Factory SLOs section with escalation matrix to RUNBOOK.md.

findings.title: Logging cross-cutting concern undefined — no schema, levels, or PII rules
findings.detail: ARCHITECTURE.md §6 lists logging as a cross-cutting concern but no document defines log schema, level taxonomy, or PII redaction rules.
findings.fix_sketch: Added logging standard to ARCHITECTURE.md §6.

findings.title: 13 of 18 spec files have last_updated 2026-05-15 despite audit activity
findings.detail: Bulk updated 13 files to 2026-05-26.
findings.fix_sketch: Bulk update last_updated to 2026-05-26.

findings.title: Protected Paths glob **/auth/** present in SECURITY.md but missing from CODEOWNERS and protected-paths workflow
findings.detail: SECURITY.md line 67 lists '**/auth/**' as a Protected Path but neither CODEOWNERS nor the workflow included it.
findings.fix_sketch: Added '**/auth/**' to CODEOWNERS and workflow paths list.

findings.title: SPRINT-2026-05-B referenced in multiple files but never created
findings.detail: SPRINT.md, ROADMAP.md, CHANGELOG.md, and .omc/STATUS.md all reference SPRINT-2026-05-B as pending since 2026-05-21.
findings.fix_sketch: STATUS.md updated to flag this explicitly. Full SPRINT-2026-05-B requires human decision.

findings.title: ENV.md 'Last verified' date (2026-05-15) does not match 'last_updated' frontmatter (2026-05-26)
findings.detail: ENV.md frontmatter says last_updated: 2026-05-26 but the footer 'Last verified' still said 2026-05-15.
findings.fix_sketch: Updated footer Last verified date.

findings.title: STATUS.md 'In flight' section references audit/nightly-2026-05-26 as push-pending — 4 days stale
findings.detail: The In-flight entry for audit/nightly-2026-05-26 was created on 2026-05-26 and referenced a push that had since completed.
findings.fix_sketch: Replaced stale In-flight entry.

findings.title: KPI.md OKRs carry stale due dates with no update
findings.detail: KR1 deadline passed 6 days ago (missed). KR2 deadline was tomorrow with no active sprint.
findings.fix_sketch: Marked KR1 as missed, KR2 at-risk.

findings.title: ROADMAP last_updated frontmatter says 2026-05-21 but footer says 2026-05-15
findings.detail: Frontmatter and footer showed contradictory dates. Footer updated to match.
findings.fix_sketch: Updated footer to match frontmatter date.

findings.title: SECURITY.md footer 'Last updated' says 2026-05-15 despite frontmatter showing 2026-05-21
findings.detail: Frontmatter and footer showed contradictory dates.
findings.fix_sketch: Updated SECURITY.md footer to current date.

findings.title: SPRINT-2026-05-B missing 9+ days after previous sprint ended — IFleet work queue has no active sprint
findings.detail: .omc/STATUS.md explicitly flags this as overdue and a hard blocker. Without an active sprint, IFleet workers have no queue and Factory's coordination-of-record value is zero. Requires human action from Sebastian/Esme.
findings.fix_sketch: Sebastian + Esme create SPRINT-2026-05-B with honest re-plan of M-001..M-015 based on actual velocity after Esme's Retell R1 decision.

findings.title: Esme R1 Retell confirmation now 20 days overdue — voice platform decision still unresolved
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md Q3 flags this as ACTION REQUIRED. ADR-0006 status remains pending. All voice-discovery work (M-005+) is blocked. Requires Esme's research findings to be filed in a new ADR or ADR-0006 to be marked confirmed.
findings.fix_sketch: Esme files R1 findings in a new ADR (0011+) OR flips ADR-0006 status to confirmed with timestamp.

findings.title: STATUS.md stale — In-flight section references 2026-05-30 push as pending and understates sprint delay
findings.detail: Fixed in 2026-06-09 nightly audit: moved stale In-flight entries to Done, updated SPRINT-B overdue count to 20 days.
findings.fix_sketch: Done.

findings.title: ROADMAP.md Q3 open question stale — 'as of 2026-05-30 (10 days elapsed)' understates urgency
findings.detail: Fixed in 2026-06-09 nightly audit: updated to 'as of 2026-06-09 (20 days elapsed)'.
findings.fix_sketch: Done.

findings.title: RISKS.md R-013 mitigation references M-026 which does not exist in ROADMAP.md
findings.detail: Fixed in 2026-06-09 nightly audit: replaced 'planned M-026' with 'future milestone (not yet scheduled in ROADMAP.md)'.
findings.fix_sketch: Done.

findings.title: ROADMAP.md frontmatter last_updated 2026-05-21 does not match footer Last verified 2026-05-30
findings.detail: Fixed in 2026-06-09 nightly audit: updated frontmatter to 2026-05-30.
findings.fix_sketch: Done.

findings.title: AGENTS.md §5 table says 'regen from frontmatter' but generator is not wired
findings.detail: Fixed in 2026-06-09 nightly audit: updated to 'Manual update to index table (automation pending M-002)'.
